title.en: Such beings want to see him?

content.en:
"The Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor is looking for me?"

Ye Tian was a little curious, the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor was not an ordinary Dao Ancestor, he was the owner of the Guquan Xuanlou, he had a very high status among the Nine Floors, and he belonged to one of the real high-rises.

Although the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor was not as good as those Ninefold Primordial Ancestors, he was also one of the incomparably powerful half-step Ninefold Primordial Ancestors.

Such beings want to see him?

"It should be that my life level has reached 9 or above, which has attracted the attention of the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor!"

Ye Tian guessed.

Soon, Ye Tian saw the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor.

"I've seen the landlord!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

"Endless Dao Ancestor, your life level has been raised to more than 9, which is very good!"

The ancestors of the Absolute Sword Dao are praised.

"Break through by luck!" Ye Tian said modestly.

The two chatted for a while.

Suddenly, the Peerless Sword Dao Ancestor mentioned, "Endless Dao Ancestor, do you have any thoughts of joining a certain underground building?"

"I don't have this plan for the time being!"

Ye Tian said truthfully.

After all, he had just joined the Guquan Xuanlou, so he went to other buildings, although they were all inside the nine-story building, but this was a little bad.

After all, each floor has assessment requirements, otherwise Guquan Xuanlou would not have given him such a good treatment.

Seeing that Ye Tian had no such plan, the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor breathed a sigh of relief, and immediately said, "Actually, for a half-step sevenfold ancestor like you, there is no difference between the Xuanlou and the Ground Tower. First of all, the minimum requirement for the Heavenly Tower is the Eightfold Ancestor, and you can't enter it. As for the underground building, it is just that it has a nine-fold original ancestor and a number of half-step nine-fold original ancestors, and the number of Dao ancestors is actually not as large as the Xuanlou. The Xuanlou is the foundation of the Nine-Story Building. Even if you enter a certain underground building, you won't be able to get too many benefits, at most you will be guided by some Ninefold Ancestors. However, your goal now is to raise your life level, and the guidance of the Ninefold Ancestor is meaningless. If you stay in the Guquan Xuanlou, the Guquan Xuanlou will give you more benefits!"

Ye Tian understood at this moment, the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor was afraid that he would run to a certain underground building!

"Lord Landlord, please rest assured, I will not leave the Ancient Spring Xuanlou for the time being, at least not when I am in the half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor Realm. Ye Tian assured.

He also knew that in the half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor realm, even if it was a heavenly tower, it would be difficult to help him much, at most he would give some points.

And the points of this thing, Xuanlou can also give.

"Half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor Realm without leaving?Endless Dao Ancestor, aren't you ready to impact the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor Realm for the time being?"

"Yes!" Ye Tian nodded, "I want to raise the life level to 9.9, and it is said that there are great benefits to raising to 9.9, so I want to continue to improve the life level." "

The Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor showed a look of understanding, after all, Ye Tian grew up very fast, he must have this idea.

However, he still reminded: "Do you know how many Dao Ancestors in the Nine-Fold Building have raised their life level to the level of 9.9 in the half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor realm now?"

"I don't know!" Ye Tian shook his head.

The Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor recounted: "Since the construction of the Nine-Fold Building, there are a total of 128 Dao Ancestors who can raise their life level to 9.9 in the half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor realm, of which 101 have fallen, and 27 are still alive!"

"How did you fall so much?"

Ye Tian was shocked.

The proportion of this fall is too high!

Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor smiled: "This ratio is normal, now is a relatively peaceful era, there is no war between the major forces, and there is no big disaster. But the nine-story building has existed for endless years, and it has experienced many crises, so there are naturally many strong people who have fallen. Many strong people fell and died in battle, and in fact, ordinary Dao Ancestors fell even more, and they couldn't even be counted. "

Ye Tian knew it and felt that it made sense.

Although the nine-story building is very powerful, there are also forces comparable to the nine-story building, and if a power war really breaks out, death is naturally inevitable.

"Landlord, what is the benefit of raising the life level to 9.9? It's just that the combat power has been improved, and it won't make the other half-step sevenfold ancestors so eager for it!" Ye Tian asked curiously.

"Naturally, there are benefits, and they are also great benefits!" "Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor said, "But this benefit can't be seen in a short period of time. For example, if you raise your life level to 9.9, you will only improve some strength, and even in the Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor, Eightfold Primordial Ancestor, or even the Half-Step Ninefold Primordial Ancestor, you won't be able to see much benefit. But once you become a Ninefold Ancestor, the difference is a bit big. When you reach the Ninefold Primordial Ancestor, it is difficult for other Dao Ancestors to improve their life level, but you can continue to ascend. If you are in the half-step Sevenfold Ancestor realm, you can't raise your life level to 9.9, then the limit of your life level in the future will be 99, and no matter how much you improve, you can't break this boundary. In the half-step Sevenfold Ancestor realm, if you raise the life level to 9.9, you can break the boundary of 99 in the future and enter the life level above 100. "

When Ye Tian heard this, he immediately understood.

is the same Ninefold Ancestor, one is 99 life level, and the other is more than 100 life level, I don't know if there is a limit, then the difference in strength is too big!

"I have to raise my life level to 9.9!"

Ye Tian said secretly in his heart.

At this time, the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor revealed: "It has been a long time since the Nine-Fold Building gave birth to a half-step sevenfold ancestor who raised the life level to 9.9, and the main reason is that many resources that have greatly increased the life level have become extinct, which has led to a lot of difficulty. However, if you want to hit the 9.9 life level, I can give you some convenience on behalf of Guquan Xuanlou. "

"Thank you, landlord!"

Ye Tian thanked.

Subsequently.

The Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor promised to give Ye Tian 10,000 points as a reward, which was already the limit of what he could call the shots.

In addition, the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor also gave Ye Tian a detailed information, which recorded some resources and treasures that were useful to him, which could improve his life level.

This information is many times more detailed than what Ye Tian knows himself!

"There are still a lot of treasures that are useful to me, but some of them are in the hands of other forces, and I can't get in. "

Ye Tian frowned.

And the resources and treasures that are helpful to the Eightfold Origin Ancestor and even the Ninth Origin Ancestor cannot have an effect on him.

He has reached the limit of his current realm, and it is difficult to continue to improve, and it has nothing to do with the grade of the treasure.

Back at the residence, Ye Tian studied it carefully, and he felt that there was a way that would help him the most, and it was the easiest to do.

"Life Magnet!"

This is not a primordial antiquity, but a special creature, a creature that has been researched by a powerful person using the fusion of an original antiquity with a special creature.

The Life Magnetic Beast is able to release a special power that continuously improves the life level of a Dao Ancestor, even if it is effective for him.

But if you release that kind of power, it will damage the origin of the Life Magnet Beast, use it too much, and even have the danger of falling.

And the Life Magnetic Beast is too rare, it is not conceived by heaven and earth, but cultivated, and it is difficult to replicate this process.

At present, there are no more than a hundred living magnetic beasts in the world, and there are only twenty-eight in the Nine-Story Building.

"It's impossible for the Nine-Story Building to let the Life Magnetic Beast sacrifice itself to improve my life level, but I can find a half-step Sevenfold Ancestral Realm Life Magnetic Beast, and then copy its body!" Ye Tian thought of this method.

But the premise was that he found a half-step Sevenfold Ancestral Realm Life Magnetic Beast, so that his plan could be completed.
